title: T-007 — Migration: d365_sync_jobs and d365_sync_dlq
prompt:
# T-007 — Migration: d365_sync_jobs and d365_sync_dlq

PRD: docs/prd/03-TECHNICAL-PRD.md §5.7, §13.1, §13.5, §13.7
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
D365 sync jobs + DLQ tables, idempotency_key UNIQUE, RLS isolation.

DLQ.error_message NOT NULL enforces V-TEC-71. idempotency_key UNIQUE enforces V-TEC-72 (duplicate detection becomes 409 at API layer). 7-year retention is policy not schema — document in ADR.

## Implementation contract
See `## Goal` + scope_files + acceptance_criteria below; preserve prototype parity, server-action semantics, RLS/org-scoping, and module red-lines listed in `## Risk red lines`.

## Files
- db/migrations/0xxx_d365_sync.sql [create]
- db/schema/d365.ts [create]
- tests/db/d365.migration.test.ts [create]

## Out of scope
- Pull worker (T-029)
- Push worker (T-030)
- DLQ UI (T-058)

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration applied, when inserting two rows with same idempotency_key, then second insert fails with unique-violation.
2. Given DLQ row attempted with empty error_message, then NOT NULL rejects.
3. Given RLS active, when org context absent, then no rows visible across both tables.

## Test strategy
- RED tests for UNIQUE idempotency + NOT NULL DLQ + RLS.
- Run: pnpm vitest run tests/db/d365.migration.test.ts

## Risk red lines
- Do not connect to live D365 in tests — schema-only here.
- FG is canonical; FA is legacy alias only — do not introduce FA-* identifiers in new schemas, code, labels, tests.
- D365 is optional integration; never use D365 IDs as hard FKs — d365_item_id is TEXT soft reference only.
- Released BOM/factory_spec edits clone-on-write a new version; never mutate an approved/released row in place.
- Shared BOM SSOT is canonical — Technical, NPD, Planning, Production, Warehouse and Finance read the same bom_headers/lines/co_products tables.
